Privacy Policy

Last updated: February 2026

Who We Are

Sheepdog Cyber Defense LLC ("we," "us," or "our") operates the website https://sheepdogcyberdefense.com.

Information We Collect

Through our contact form, we collect:

  • Name
  • Company (if provided)
  • Email address
  • City/Area (optional)
  • Service interest (optional)
  • Message content

We also collect the submission timestamp and basic technical information (IP address, user agent) that Netlify Forms provides.

How We Use Information

We use the information you provide to:

  • Respond to your inquiry
  • Provide quotes or information about our services
  • Communicate with you about ongoing engagements

Data Retention

We retain contact form submissions for our business records. We do not set an automatic expiration but will honor deletion requests where feasible.

Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties. The only third party involved is Netlify, Inc., our hosting provider, which processes form submissions on our behalf.

Security

We take reasonable measures to protect your information. However, no method of electronic transmission is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

Your Rights

You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us at sheepdogcyberdefense@protonmail.com.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

Contact

Questions? Contact us at: sheepdogcyberdefense@protonmail.com

© 2022 - 2026 Sheepdog Cyber Defense LLC. All rights reserved.
